focus: Recurring budgeting, saving, spending, and money-management loops for individuals.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Finance / Money Ops. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring budgeting, saving, spending, and money-management loops for individuals.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Paycheck Allocation Loop
raw_candidates.description: A personal finance workflow that routes each paycheck into repeated allocations across bills, saving, and conviction bets.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated paycheck allocation loop workflow inside the finance / money ops wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Paycheck Allocation Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next paycheck allocation loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: A lot of money management pain happens right when income lands and people have to re-decide the split every time.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: A lot of money management pain happens right when income lands and people have to re-decide the split every time.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 2 for Finance / Money Ops. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring budgeting, saving, spending, and money-management loops for individuals.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Subscription Prune Loop
raw_candidates.description: A recurring utility for surfacing stale subscriptions, low-value renewals, and easy monthly savings.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated subscription prune loop workflow inside the finance / money ops wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Subscription Prune Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next subscription prune loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: People repeatedly leak money through neglected recurring charges that are annoying enough to ignore but frequent enough to matter.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: People repeatedly leak money through neglected recurring charges that are annoying enough to ignore but frequent enough to matter.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 3 for Finance / Money Ops. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring budgeting, saving, spending, and money-management loops for individuals.

Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Spending Pattern Reset Loop
raw_candidates.description: A feedback loop for identifying spending drift and resetting behavior before it compounds into financial regret.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated spending pattern reset loop workflow inside the finance / money ops wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Spending Pattern Reset Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next spending pattern reset loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Consumers usually notice bad money habits late, after they have already become normalized.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Consumers usually notice bad money habits late, after they have already become normalized.
